creator: alexander@wittig.name
text:
Created attachment 196061
patch with update

Update to version 2.6.1 which most importantly fixes PHP 7 compatibility.

Changes in 2.6.0 see https://github.com/Icinga/icingaweb2/releases/tag/v2.6.0
2.6.1 fixes only a regression in 2.6.0: https://github.com/Icinga/icingaweb2/releases/tag/v2.6.1

I tested this as far as I can on my simple icinga installation and it seems to work well (with php 7.2.8) without any changes after upgrading.
